# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_DIR: "dist"
  CONFIG_DIR: "config"

build:compile:
  stage: build
  image: node:18-alpine
  script:
    - echo "Compiling application..."
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - mkdir -p ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "Binary content v1.0.0" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app-binary
    - echo "Binary content v1.0.0" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/worker-binary
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app-binary
    - chmod +x ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/worker-binary
    - echo '{"version":"1.0.0","env":"production"}' > ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config.json
    - echo '{"database":"postgres","host":"localhost"}' > ${CONFIG_DIR}/db.config.json
    - echo "Build completed at $(date)" > ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/build-info.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "build-artifacts-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - tags

build:docker:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-cli
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  script:
    - echo "Building Docker image..."
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}
    - echo "FROM alpine:latest" > Dockerfile
    - echo "COPY app.sh /app.sh" >> Dockerfile
    - echo "RUN chmod +x /app.sh" >> Dockerfile
    - echo '#!/bin/sh' > app.sh
    - echo 'echo "Application running"' >> app.sh
    - docker build -t myapp:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
    - docker save myapp:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} -o ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/myapp-image.tar
    - echo "Docker image saved"
  artifacts:
    name: "docker-image-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/myapp-image.tar
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main
    - develop

test:unit:
  stage: test
  image: node:18-alpine
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests with built artifacts..."
    - ls -la ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
    - ls -la ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config.json
    - echo "Testing binary: ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app-binary"
    - test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app-binary || exit 1
    - test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/worker-binary || exit 1
    - echo "Unit tests passed"
  artifacts:
    name: "test-results-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - test-results/
    reports:
      junit: test-results/junit.xml
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always

test:integration:
  stage: test
  image: node:18-alpine
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/db.config.json
    - echo "Validating configuration files..."
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config.json || exit 1
    - test -f ${CONFIG_DIR}/db.config.json || exit 1
    - echo "Integration tests passed"
  only:
    - main
    - develop

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - apk add --no-cache rsync openssh
    - ls -la ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
    - ls -la ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - echo "Copying binaries to staging server..."
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app-binary /tmp/app-binary-staging
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/worker-binary /tmp/worker-binary-staging
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/*.json /tmp/
    - echo "Executing deployment scripts..."
    - sh -c "echo 'Simulating deployment of app-binary'"
    - sh -c "echo 'Simulating deployment of worker-binary'"
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
  artifacts:
    name: "deployment-logs-staging-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - deployment-logs/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - develop
  when: manual

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
    - build:docker
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - apk add --no-cache docker-cli
    - ls -la ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/
    - echo "Loading Docker image..."
    - test -f ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/myapp-image.tar || exit 1
    - echo "Deploying binaries..."
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/app-binary /tmp/app-binary-prod
    - cp ${ARTIFACT_DIR}/worker-binary /tmp/worker-binary-prod
    - echo "Deploying configurations..."
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.config.json /tmp/app.config.json
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/db.config.json /tmp/db.config.json
    - echo "Starting services..."
    - sh -c "echo 'Service started successfully'"
    - mkdir -p deployment-logs
    - echo "Production deployment completed at $(date)" > deployment-logs/prod-deploy.log
  artifacts:
    name: "deployment-logs-production-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - deployment-logs/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  when: manual

deploy:rollback:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  environment:
    name: production
    action: rollback
  script:
    - echo "Rolling back production deployment..."
    - echo "Fetching previous artifacts..."
    - echo "Restoring previous version..."
    - echo "Rollback completed"
  only:
    - main
  when: manual

cache:
  key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}
  paths:
    - node_modules/
    - .npm/
